name: Dea
developer: José Antonio De los Ángeles Rodríguez
publisher: José Antonio De los Ángeles Rodríguez
short_description: A fantasy/science fiction turn-based RPG. Defeat lots of monsters using mysterious weapons and powerful spells as you progress on this game's emotional story.
detailed_description:
A classic turn-based RPG that takes place in a world filled with charismatic characters and interesting stories. "A self-proclaimed goddess asks a boy and his friends to protect Lastia, the last piece of land remaining in their world... but why them?"
Join them in this adventure made with RPG Maker for fans of old school RPGs.
about_the_game:
